subparts.text: Define data organization. What are the common issues faced in organizing data effectively?
List and explain the key components of the Digital India Program.
Differentiate between invention and innovation with suitable examples.
Discuss at least two techniques used to stimulate lateral thinking.

questions.question_text: Differentiate between a Database Management System and a file system. What are the advantages of using a DBMS?
Describe the role of ETL in building a data warehouse.
Distinguish between e-commerce and traditional commerce with examples.
What are the types of e-governance? Explain the benefits of each.
What is concurrent engineering? How does it help in innovation?
Compare and contrast product innovation with process innovation.
Define lateral thinking. How is it different from vertical thinking?
Explain the difference between logical thinking and creative thinking with suitable examples.
